name: ClearCo
description: Make performance visible, continuous, and fair by aligning goals, feedback, and coaching with dashboards that track progress. Learn more about ClearCo

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: The overall experience was positive. When needed we pulled in the president to get things resolved in time for our implementation. Running our salary planning for the first time this year went surprisingly smoothly, thanks to the partnership in implementation.
reviews.review_pros: We looked at several systems to meet our global compensation planning needs and we felt TalentComp was the best fit. Not only does it accommodate salary planning in 12 countries, it is intuitive and allows managers to export their information to do their modeling offline and import it back into TalentComp, something they could not do with our prior system. Also, they can pull the comp statements at any time.
reviews.review_cons: We had a lot of back and forth during set up with many things that should have been addressed up front. We also had to rework the comp statement several times with the implementation team to get it into the format we wanted because we could not modify it ourselves.

reviews.review_description: We really enjoy using ClearCompany. We currently use it for our recruiting processes and peformance management and it's been working well!
reviews.review_pros: Easy for applicants and employees to use. Easy to navigate. Automates a lot of our processes that used to be manual. Support staff is always available for questions or troubleshooting
reviews.review_cons: There tends to be bugs occassionally (but I believe that's the case with most software so it's not uncommon).

reviews.review_description: I migrated our HR/Recruiting department to ClearCompany from a more expensive Legacy ATS that was showing its age and cost much more. Beware of a few things. First, while they aren't a bad software suite, they aren't great, and suffer from not being particularly good in any one aspect compared to competitors, whether its functionality, features, price, etc. They do, however, have a great sales team that is prepared to sell their product as the next great thing. They also spent a lot of money on help modules (professional Youtube clips) and making their software aesthetically pleasing. However, when in actual use, the software is not as good as the image would lead you to believe. It is one of the more glitchy pieces of HR software I've ever used with experience in excess of over 10 ATS/HRIS/CRM/etc. Using it is not intuitive, from selecting dispositions, to making changes, to posting ads, to running reports. For the price, it in the lower half of pricing for equivalent ATS software packages, but on the high end of that, and each additional option and login costs a lot. There are a lot of competing products that are easier to use, less prone to malfunctions, and cheaper. While an HR department probably wouldn't hate this product, since it does work, there are absolutely better products in both directions, both at a higher price point with more functionality, as well as at lower price points with equivalent functionality.
reviews.review_pros: The portal is aesthetically pleasing, with a very modern design approach. It is priced decently, although not great, cheaper than large vendors like Taleo, etc., but there are cheaper options that offer roughly the same functionality (and some better). They remain focused on compliance and update standardized forms. The Onboarding side is better than their ATS.
reviews.review_cons: Nickel and dime for every extra item. Additional user seats are expensive. Data migration from previous ATS is expensive. Changes to the format, questions, dispositions, stages, etc. are not easy and it is hard to tailor to your company/department's specific individualized needs. In order to make it pretty, they made it very difficult to change formatting. In addition, if you require ClearCompany to make a change, it takes a while and costs a lot. Controls are pretty, but aren't intuitive. They are NOT GoogleforJobs compliant. When I last asked them for an update in 2017, they stated it wasn't necessary and had only the most vague understanding of why this was important. Their mobile optimization is horrible and frequently has issues. Their ATS is glitchy.

reviews.review_description: Impressed with setup and training. Initial setup was quicker than I thought it would be, and subsequent years implementation was very efficient. Probably one of the most customizable applications I've ever used. Easy to use for all managers, even those that were computer challenged!
reviews.review_pros: Incredibly customizable. Support from CWS was prompt and accurate.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing specific comes to mind other than I did need to make sure our internal IT department whitelisted the email domain from TalentComp, but that was more of a con on our end.

reviews.review_title: ClearCompany is a key to our Talent Management!
reviews.review_description: I really enjoy using this platform, and I login to it daily. It is easy to use and is always improving. There are even places you can customize your view (like in the candidate tearsheet) and I have found that useful! I also enjoy all the feature updates in their quarterly roundup videos.
reviews.review_pros: I really enjoy the thoroughness of the ClearCo platform, the ease of implementation, our account and support teams, and the ease of use. I am definitely a power user of this platform in my company and I think it is really easy to follow along with a candidacy. We had a superb implementation team that addressed all of our concerns and helped with some items after. Since implementation we've reached out with many questions and enhancement requests to see what could be improved in the system - and while not everything changed, they were heard. I enjoy using this platform both as a Talent Management System and internally to track our org wide goals, personal goals, and the performance platform.
reviews.review_cons: As with any software, there are bugs from time to time. A few times my support requests didn't make it through, and some integrations we wanted couldn't be made. However, our account team has been available to talk through many ideas and the platform is always improving.

reviews.review_title: ClearCompany is the best introduction for new hire.
reviews.review_description: Customization is easy and effective. ClearCompany is user friendly and saves us time and energy. It has also built the spirit of collaboration and team work.
reviews.review_pros: I appreciate every step I make with ClearCompany. It is a user friendly way to engage with new hires in harmony and effectively. ClearCompany is a perfect match for my career and it acts as a baseline for my operations. For a while, I have benefited first hand and no regrets so far. It is a tool I would recommend to anyone.
reviews.review_cons: The software is easy to use and surely easy to deploy. I don't have any challenging moments since the software is highly relatable easy to set up.

reviews.review_title: Good ATS for companies averaging < 15 open jobs
reviews.review_description: Prior to implementing ClearCompany in April of 2017, we did not have any sort of candidate management software. We were eager to find a software to help us organize as we were consistently recruiting for at least 15 open jobs at all times. ClearCompany's product helped our teams organize hiring efforts and streamline processes all while allowing Hiring Managers the ability to stay connected and engaged with the process. Through daily use of the system we were able to better understand and identify a list of performance features we needed from an ATS to ensure our team's success. After about a year of use, our recruiting volume had nearly doubled and our need for task management and automation features increased. Adding in frustrations of daily system issues and the amount of outstanding tickets left unresolved for months on end, we started to demo other systems. Ultimately, we selected another ATS that better fit our growing needs and concerns.
reviews.review_pros: Absolutely loved the way the candidate pipeline was broken down and organized with customization options for both interview stages and workflow within a specific interview stage. Customization abilities for just about every feature within the system allows any company to tailor the system to fit their specific or unique process. Offer letter creation and offer process was extremely seamless and easy to use. Could generate and send offer letter for approval and then to candidate for signature in seconds and without the use of a 3rd party DocuSign type system. The ability to rate candidates A, B, C or X was helpful in keeping a visual rating of candidates within your pipeline. Integration and set-up was an easy process, however, training and resources could use some improvement. Dashboard layout was easy to navigate and access.
reviews.review_cons: ClearCompany was a glitchy system; we were consistently submitting support tickets for re-occurring issues with common features that slowed or required us to create a workaround within the hiring process. Customer Support would usually have to escalate issues to their development team and it would be months before we had an update or a resolution. Customer Support teams and Account Managers could use some improvement on communication and also follow through on actionable items they said they would deliver on. New product features were usually released before proper bug testing was done creating usability concerns and an abundance of support tickets. They also usually came with very little training or lack or good resources leaving the user confused and overwhelmed on how to utilize these great new features. Reporting was extremely limited. Some of the most basic and general recruiting metrics could not be produced through reports and had to be either manually tracked or data had to be manipulated. There were a few times where we found discrepancies on specific job reports vs. the data tracked on the job req's dashboard. Interview Scorecards were extremely confusing, hard to access/change/set-up quickly and not user friendly once they were set up. Lack of automation and key features in comparison to other ATS systems within the same price point.

reviews.review_title: Best for recruitment and onboarding to performance metrics and employee engagement.
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with ClearCompany has been very positive. The platform is easy to use, and the customer support is really helpful and responsive. The integrations available for ClearCompany allow for easy integration between various tools, making it easy to manage and automate tasks related to onboarding and managing new hires. It also provides a comprehensive suite of tools for performance management. The cost is also quite reasonable, especially when compared to similar platforms.
reviews.review_pros: Some of the most impactful features of ClearCompany include their onboarding and employee engagement platforms, performance tracking, and analytics. The platform is intuitive and easy to use, and the integration process with existing systems is seamless and simple. ClearCompany makes it easy to customize processes and workflow to fit the needs and goals of any organization.
reviews.review_cons: The least liked aspect of ClearCompany was the lack of customization options for reports and data visualization. The templates for these features were basic and not very useful for more in-depth and detailed analysis. Additionally, it was also hard to set up and manage a centralized database for all our company data.

reviews.review_description: I entered in expecting what I have seen before with other major HRM software companies. I expected constant growing pains and problems and lackluster customer service. ClearCompany proved me wrong and has consistently delivered quality product support and customer service for the two tears that I have been using the product.
reviews.review_pros: It is super user friendly! Although it is a quality product with great functions, you don't have to be a techie to catch on to how everything works. You are never alone as far as product support. This company is constantly inquiring about how to make the product better. That is how they stay on top with this product. Other HRM software management companies over promise and under deliver... Not Clear Company. They are constantly right there to answer questions quickly and resolve concerns at amazing speed.
reviews.review_cons: The few things that I could point out are honestly more of a preference than a problem. It would be nice to have a few other ways to search for applicants, i.e. by phone number or email address, but again, that is only a preference. Everything this software says it will do, it does .

reviews.review_title: Applicant tracking made easy with Clear Company
reviews.review_description: Overall, we’ve had great success with ClearCompany. The platform is very user-friendly, which allows our team to seamlessly use the application without significant training. The platform also has plenty of integrations with other applications, including Slack and Microsoft Teams, so our team can conveniently access important information. These integrations have allowed our team to use the system more effectively.
reviews.review_pros: ClearCompany integrates all our applicants into one place. We can now easily email and text applicants. If you’re looking for a system that helps you organize and communicate with all of your applicants, I recommend trying ClearCompany.
reviews.review_cons: The reporting is subpar and you would be better off with a different applicant tracking system. Clear company does not block an applicant from applying to a position multiple times, leading to a lot of clutter in the system that you might find unnecessary or confusing.

reviews.review_description: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Definitely a 5-Star Experience!! From the east to use user interface, to the over the top customer service!! Thank you Clear company for helping us make Centex Mortuary what they are today!!!
reviews.review_pros: I really enjoy the ease of the use of the Clear company Program. We completely restructured our company, & just did a large amount of hiring in a short amount of time & Clear company shined like a star!!
reviews.review_cons: So far I am completely satisfied with all the features of the Clear company Program!!

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Pleasantly surprise. This is my first time using it and I am already recommending it to other colleagues in the industry.
reviews.review_pros: The efficiency of being able to do onboarding all electronically which means they don't have to spend the time to drive to the hotel just to fill out a piece of paper before they start their job. I also like how easy it is to keep track of candidates as they move down the pipeline in the hiring process, how you can text and email them right from the website, etc.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing. I went through the onboarding process myself and now I am onboarding other associates, and I think the site is great!!!

reviews.review_description: Implementing TalentComp made managing our annual salary review exercise so much easier than sending a multitude of excel spreadsheets to managers for completion. Good customer service made implementation fairly easy. Good people, genuinely interested in my success. Very much appreciated.
reviews.review_pros: 1) ease of use - managers required little to no training2) customizable rules for different groups3) can manage multiple currencies
reviews.review_cons: Delivering Total Rewards Statements to employees presented some challenges. We managed to come up with a workaround that aimed to go beyond the basics, although the outcome fell short of our expectations.

reviews.review_description: We have setup a Performance Review process, that captures and maintains performance review data for our staff in one place. We conduct reviews 3 times per year. The workflow saves an incredible amount of time and the reviews are part of our Bonus program, so with a simple download, we are able to facilitate bonus calculations within hours rather than days.
reviews.review_pros: We use this software to manage our Performance Review process. We are able to structure the reviews how we would like to see them, and use the workflow to channel the review from the initial reviewer to 2nd and 3rd level approvers. We plan to use the 360 review process in the future. Overall, the process within the application works very well.
reviews.review_cons: I'd suggest that reporting could be improved. I'd like the ability to download any data element from ClearCompany, not just the canned reports, and massage it in a spreadsheet.

reviews.review_title: Stop Using Spreadsheets for Salary Admin - TalentComp is a lifesaver!!!
reviews.review_description: From start to finish, it was a great process. We are very happy with the final product.
reviews.review_pros: There are so many things that made the transition to TalentComp the best solution for our Salary Admin process, one of the top reasons is the ability to have managers route their recommendations through the hierarchy and have an audit trail. In our legacy process, we had an excel spreadsheet for each department, we have 32 departments and had to route and track changes for 32 spreadsheets! It was madness! The software's reporting capabilities was not complex and they were able to provide a template report to look exactly like our Excel version of the process. Integration was great and very easy. Our tech was responsive and knowledgeable and if he did not have the answer he would find out and respond timely. The whole process took about 8 weeks. I will say that once we rolled out the new process to our managers, I felt like I had so much extra time during a very busy chaotic time of year. We are very happy with the finished product and our managers enjoyed using the system as well!
reviews.review_cons: Honestly, there was nothing that we did not like about the software!

reviews.review_title: ClearCo Made My Job Easier! Thank you for the great support!!.
reviews.review_description: I honestly have had a very pleasant experience. I am confident when using the system and feel supported. I really enjoyed having the freedom to explore the system on my own with resources from ClearCo.
reviews.review_pros: I love the support we've received and continue to receive. Great friendly service and fast!
reviews.review_cons: I would like it to provide more options to connect to different softwares. ADP Run for example.

reviews.review_description: Clear is a great option if you are looking for a one-stop shop, and willing to pay for extra features.
reviews.review_pros: The HR on-boarding process is straightforward and reliable. Tracking candidates is easy and requisitions are easy to deploy. Customer service is expensive but very responsive and very helpful.
reviews.review_cons: The platform is very inflexible in terms of exporting data, especially application answers. Usage of their API is behind a pay wall, and reporting is lackluster.

reviews.review_pros: We use ClearCompany in combination with Proliant, having it in one location is easy, better than having multiple tabs open. I like that we can assign hiring managers to their positions and empower them to review their resumes and make calls, this way they know what their program needs and being a non profit we have particular grants that have certain needs and the hiring managers know more about this.
reviews.review_cons: That certain tools will change frequently without a heads up.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: So far we have really enjoyed our move to Clear Company. The implementation team have been so very helpful in getting us up and running very quickly. We have weekly calls to make sure things are moving along the way they should, and I feel like I always have support if I need any help. The whole applicant tracking module is very customizable, so all of our needs were able to be met without a problem. Overall, so far I feel like it's worth the extra money we're paying (compared to our old system) to have such time savings and ease of use.
reviews.review_pros: We purchased all three modules, but so far have only fully implemented one of them (applicant tracking). We are currently beginning implementation of the onboarding module, and the performance management module will be last. So far, we really like the applicant tracking module. Hiring managers have told me they find it easy to use, very intuitive and easy to figure out. I especially like the interview invitation piece, because it integrates with my Outlook calendar and the entire process is automated. No longer do I have to spend hours on the phone trying to schedule candidates for interviews... this system practically does it for me. I also really like the Scorecard feature, where I can route Scorecards with each application to the entire hiring team and have them review and score each candidate on their own. I can then review all of their notes and it helps me narrow down my search very quickly. So far I'm really enjoying the time savings that Clear Company has given me.
reviews.review_cons: So far, there's really nothing I don't like about it. Again, we've only fully implemented one module, and have only been using it for a couple of weeks. But so far I really like everything about it. If I had to identify one con, it would be that there is an additional cost to add more than three customized forms in the onboarding module. But I'm working around that, so not a really big deal.

reviews.author_profession: Sr Director, Total Rewards & People Operations
reviews.review_pros: It's relatively easy to use and it is less expensive than others -b but you pay for what you get. Our organization has started to outgrow TC and it's capabilities which is making it harder to manage our merit cycle
reviews.review_cons: It's not synced to our HRIS, everything is manual and there is very little customization and features (to able to handle promotions directly in the tool)

reviews.review_description: Overall ClearCo is great!
reviews.review_pros: This product is very user friendly for recruiters!
reviews.review_cons: the backend set up is a bit confusing and the Data does not reflect the same as the dashboard. I would like to see that info to be easier to pull and manage. I would like to have more search or sorting features as well.

reviews.review_title: The best tool for personnel working in recruitment and selection of personnel
reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Saving time, managing profiles of candidates in an organized way fluidity of information, selection process and recruitment faster and more efficiently
reviews.review_pros: It allows you to access the information of the candidate in an agile way, you can search with the filters the specific characteristics that you need that meets the candidate, it facilitates you to send by mail the data of the candidate to the requesting management so that it is evaluated. Clear Company is easy to use, has a wide variety of options and allows you to regroup the candidates by categories or profiles, allows you to schedule interviews, allows you to see the profile of candidates in a simple way, allows to make comments of the candidates, in general terms this is a very useful tool that can facilitate the tasks of selection and recruitment of personnel
reviews.review_cons: So far the benefits obtained from the program are more than the negative points, in fact it has been a lot of help to our area of selection of personnel, because it facilitated the activities, see the profiles of the candidates, have the information of the candidates organized , give a quick response to the units that require a professional for a certain bacchante, we can send you directly by mail the profiles of the possible candidates for them to evaluate them and we can choose the one whose profile meets the minimum requirements for the position or charge, has allowed us to improve our quality of management and service.

reviews.review_title: Clear Company is a great tool and resource!
reviews.review_description: Clear Company has been a great resource through our payroll provider.
reviews.review_pros: We use Clear Company not only for recruiting purposes, but also for background checks/screenings. The recruiting site is great and easy to create a requisition and monitor the applicants. The background/screening tool is great, fast, and very user friendly.
reviews.review_cons: So far, so good. No cons, at the moment!

reviews.review_description: Multi-use system with a lot of great features. Makes onboarding and reaching out to candidates a breeze.
reviews.review_pros: Clear company is so easy to navigate and keep track of applicants and employees. All you need to go through the recruiting and onbarding processes.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes it does run slow and that is hard on busy days when its utilized the most.

reviews.review_title: Great for STI and Annual Salary Review
reviews.review_description: Excellent customer service, quick responses and helpful feedback in designing the system.
reviews.review_pros: Having direct access to the programmer is invaluable and so efficient.
reviews.review_cons: Some added reporting functionality intended for those who audit and then reports for those who review (Leadership, Finance).
